_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Only 26% of control RT4 cells showed no projections, but 53% of Merlin overexpressing RT4 cells failed to build processes...the length of these projections was shorter in Merlin overexpressing RT4 cells (122.44 ± 6.32 μm)
details: NF2 overexpression increased cells with no projections from 26% to 53% and shortened projection length from 154.12±5.74 μm to 122.44±6.32 μm
